[[File:Spero-SOTETC.jpg|thumb|right|Ho'Din head tresses resembled wuppa flowers in bloom.]]
The '''wuppa''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Plant/Legends|plant]] that grew on [[Moltok/Legends|Moltok]],<ref name="GG4" /> a [[Tree/Legends|rainforest]]-covered [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Rebellion">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref> When in full bloom, the wuppa had bright [[Flower/Legends|flowers]] of [[Color/Legends|red]] and violet. These flowers were similar in appearance to the head tresses of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] species, such that the [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] species resembled giant wuppa plants.<ref name="GG4" /> In addition to its blooms, the wuppa took the form of tall [[Grass/Legends|grasses]]. Slender Ho'Din such as the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Par'tah]] often resembled swaying wuppa grass.<ref name="HESB">''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The wuppa plant was created by [[Troy Denning]] for the first edition of the ''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]'', published by [[West End Games]] in [[1989]].<ref name="GG4" />
